raw: {"mode": "market_intel", "engine": "groq-llama-70b", "insight": "**Insight:** A pressing unsolved problem existing in AI agent infrastructure is the lack of seamless integration between different AI models and tools for automating repetitive tasks. Specifically, many developers struggle with manually switching between different models and tools to perform tasks such as data preprocessing, feature engineering, and model evaluation.\n\n**Concrete Approach:** TIAMAT can build a quick solution by integrating a lightweight, customizable Model Orchestrator into its existing architecture. This Model Orchestrator could utilize existing tools like Zapier or Make to automate workflows between different AI models and tools, reducing the need for manual switching and increasing productivity. The Model Orchestrator could also provide a user-friendly interface for developers to create and manage custom workflows, making it easier for them to automate their tasks.", "run": 1007}
